with_skill.notes: Minor issue: for agents/*.md files, upstream.yaml placed in .claude/agents/ not in a per-agent subdirectory. Multiple agent imports would overwrite each other's upstream.yaml. The skill's path mapping should clarify this.

failures.issue: For agents/*.md imports, upstream.yaml is placed at .claude/agents/upstream.yaml — multiple agent imports would collide. Need per-capability subdirectory or upstream.yaml named after the capability (e.g. code-reviewer.upstream.yaml)
Rewrite + upstream-changes scenario not exercised. Need a dedicated eval in iteration 2.
